base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_magical_key — a pickup_item (power_item) from 1986 legend of zelda. Magical Key — opens all doors without consuming. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Magical Key — opens all doors without consuming; found in Level 8
